endpoints.label: Full curated atlas
endpoints.use: Human-readable project data with source links, dossiers, endogenous maps, and exposure cases.

endpoints.label: Null-only feed
endpoints.use: Normalized feed for filtering strict nulls, low-function review records, protective LoF, systemic candidates, and PGx nulls.

endpoints.label: Static null API alias
endpoints.use: Same records as data/nulls-only.json, placed under api/ for consumers that expect API-like paths.

endpoints.label: Null variant feed
endpoints.use: Normalized allele, marker, and gene-level LoF rows with strict/review status.

endpoints.label: Static null variant API alias
endpoints.use: Same records as data/null-variants.json, placed under api/ for consumers that expect API-like paths.

endpoints.label: Gene-specific ingest rules
endpoints.use: Per-gene source priorities, include/review/exclude mechanisms, and null-only curation rules.

endpoints.label: External source catalog
endpoints.use: Public data sources and filters used to enrich null records.

queryPattern: This is a static GitHub Pages API. Fetch JSON and filter client-side.
